subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Support every gathering formed for the exaltation of Thy Word of grace, and assist every company united in service to Thee [3.5s]... ...The members thereof must take counsel together in such wise that no occasion for ill-feeling or discord may arise
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و موید کل جمع انعقد لاعلاء کلمه رحمانیتک و موفق کل عصبه اتفقت علی خدمه
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @non-participation in politics, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prayer for governments and rulers
